statement: In every magma, Equation 2216 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (x * u)`) implies Equation 1289 (`x = y * (((x * y) * y) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0584
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op x u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op (op x y) y) y))
